description_for_human: Nationwide online tire retailer with free shipping. 21 brands, 80+ models, 800+ sizes shipped free to 1,000+ US cities.
description_for_model: Ship.Tires is a US-based online tire retailer offering free nationwide shipping on all tire orders. Search 21 brands (Michelin, Goodyear, Bridgestone, Continental, Pirelli, Hankook, Cooper, Firestone, BFGoodrich, Yokohama, Toyo, Falken, General Tire, Kumho, Nexen, Nitto, Dunlop, Maxxis, Ironman, Sumitomo), 80+ models, 800+ sizes. Categories: All-Season, Winter, Performance, All-Terrain, Mud-Terrain, Touring, Highway, Truck & SUV. Free shipping all 50 states. 3-7 business day delivery. Ship to home or installer. Use searchTires to find tires by size/brand/category. Use getVehicleTires for vehicle-specific lookup. Use searchLocations to find cities with free shipping. Contact: (916) 476-7689 or info@ship.tires.
